# Cortex Finance Monitor

> Real-time finance and trading dashboard — global markets, stock exchanges, central banks, commodities, forex, crypto, and economic indicators in a unified view.

Cortex Finance Monitor is an open-source (AGPL-3.0) finance dashboard. It is a rebranded deployment of the finance variant of the open-source World Monitor platform by Elie Habib. It runs as a web app and installable PWA.

The project is built with TypeScript, Vite, MapLibre GL JS, deck.gl, and D3.js. Browser-side clustering and local analysis run in the client; serverless APIs publish cached market, macro, and forecast data refreshed by a scheduled data pipeline (GitHub Actions seeds writing to a Redis cache).

## Main pages

- [Dashboard](https://cortex-finance-monitor.vercel.app): Live markets, central banks, commodities, forex, crypto, economic indicators
- [Pro](https://cortex-finance-monitor.vercel.app/pro): AI analyst, personalized digests, custom widgets, MCP for Claude & GPT

## Data Layers — Finance & Markets

- **Stock Exchanges**: 29 global exchanges — mega (NYSE, NASDAQ, Shanghai, Euronext, Tokyo), major (Hong Kong, London, NSE/BSE, Toronto, Korea, Saudi Tadawul), and emerging markets — with market caps and trading hours
- **Financial Centers**: 19 centers ranked by Global Financial Centres Index
- **Central Banks & Institutions**: 14 central-bank and supranational finance institutions — 12 policy-rate institutions (Federal Reserve, ECB, BoJ, BoE, PBoC, SNB, RBA, BoC, RBI, BoK, BCB, SAMA) plus BIS and IMF
- **Commodity Hubs**: 10 exchanges and physical hubs (CME Group, ICE, LME, SHFE, DCE, TOCOM, DGCX, MCX, Rotterdam, Houston)
- **Gulf FDI Investments**: Saudi/UAE foreign direct investments plotted globally, color-coded by status, sized by investment amount

## Data Layers — Market & Crypto Intelligence

- **Macro Signals**: Composite market-regime indicators from liquidity, flow structure, technical trend, and sentiment inputs
- **Fear & Greed Index**: 30-day history with sentiment classification
- **Stablecoin Peg Monitor**: USDT, USDC, DAI, FDUSD, USDe — deviation tracking
- **Oil & Energy Analytics**: WTI/Brent crude prices, US production, and inventory levels via EIA API
- **Prediction Markets**: Polymarket and Kalshi market odds

## Data Sources

- Macro and central bank data: FRED, IMF, BIS
- Market quotes: Finnhub, Alpha Vantage, Yahoo Finance
- Commodities and energy: EIA, Alpha Vantage
- Prediction markets: Polymarket, Kalshi
- Curated financial news RSS feeds

## AI Features

- **Cortex Analyst** (Pro): streaming AI market analyst with live data context injected from the active feeds
- **AI Forecasts**: LLM-generated market forecasts refreshed by the data pipeline
- BYOK (bring your own key) support for optional AI providers

## Documentation

- [Source Code](https://github.com/pilotnavia/cortex-finance-monitor): GitHub repository (AGPL-3.0)
- [README](https://github.com/pilotnavia/cortex-finance-monitor/blob/main/README.md): Project documentation
- [Onboarding Guide](https://github.com/pilotnavia/cortex-finance-monitor/blob/main/docs/CORTEX-ONBOARDING.md): Architecture, variant system, Pro model, data pipeline
- [Short LLM Documentation](https://cortex-finance-monitor.vercel.app/llms.txt): Compact version of this file

## Attribution

Cortex Finance Monitor is based on [World Monitor](https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor) by Elie Habib, an open-source real-time global intelligence platform (AGPL-3.0). The complete source code of this deployment, including all modifications, is available in the repository above.
